# kemp_certificate (Data Source)

Reads metadata for a certificate stored on a Kemp LoadMaster by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_certificate" "existing" {
  name = "my-cert"
}

output "cert_type" {
  value = data.kemp_certificate.existing.type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the certificate as stored on the LoadMaster.

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) Cert type as reported by LoadMaster (`cert`, `pfx`, etc.).
